headline: Goldman Sachs, Bank of America, JP Morgan, Netflix, J&J, Producer Prices, and More to Watch This Week
summary: Big Banks kick off first-quarter earnings, but we’ll also hear from Abbot Labs, PepsiCo, ASML, and more. And we’ll see economic data on producer prices, housing, and the mood among small businesses.

headline: Wall Street Brunch: Earnings Arrive Amid Hormuz Standoff
summary: Big banks and tech names kick off earnings season this week. Trump orders U.S. to block Strait of Hormuz shipping traffic. Fed Beige Book and speakers guide rate outlook this week.
